title: Surgeon Vacancy at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Glenmark Pharmaceuticals in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Glenmark Pharmaceuticals:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Glenmark Pharmaceuticals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
